description:
Turn any image into a floating desktop sticker with the background removed, in one right-click.

Sticker turns any image into a floating, click-through desktop sticker with its
background removed by a local AI matting model — no uploads, no API keys, fully
offline after the one-time model download. Right-click an image in Explorer and
choose "Open as sticker": the subject peels off and hovers on your desktop, you
can drag it anywhere, transparent areas pass clicks through, and your stickers
come back exactly where you left them after a reboot.
